summary_en: Tender offer by Kindenden Co., Ltd. to acquire Kodensha Co., Ltd. at ¥11,501 per share. Minimum acceptance threshold 1,336,800 shares (66.67% post-acquisition). Offer period May 26–Jul 6, 2026 (30 business days). Target full subsidiary status and delisting. Board recommends shareholder acceptance.
title_en: Notice of Statement of Support and Recommendation for Application regarding Public Tender Offer for Shares of the Company by Kindenden Co., Ltd.
translation_en_brief: On 25 May 2026, Kodensha Co., Ltd. announced that its board of directors has expressed support for and recommends shareholder acceptance of a public tender offer by Kindenden Co., Ltd. to acquire all outstanding shares of Kodensha. The offer price is ¥11,501 per ordinary share. The tender offer runs for 30 business days from 26 May to 6 July 2026. The minimum number of shares Kindenden must acquire is 1,336,800 shares (which would result in 66.67% ownership post-transaction). The board's recommendation is conditioned on Kindenden's stated intent to make Kodensha a wholly-owned subsidiary and achieve delisting. No prior capital relationship, personnel ties, or related-party status exists between the parties, though the two groups have existing operating-level transactions in equipment contracting. The board has formally endorsed the offer and encourages shareholders to tender their shares.
